narrative: US-Iran escalation drives a geopolitical risk premium as WTI crude surges 11% toward $84 — USD/JPY holds at 162.34 with 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustaining the bid despite intervention risk; gold lower -0.18% near $4,011; equities -1.01%; DXY -0.01%; VIX 18.8. Options markets show moderate hedging demand with a -1.37 25d RR skew in USD/JPY as realized volatility remains compressed. Watch the ECB interest rate decision on July 23 for the next G10 policy catalyst.
